title: Chapter Six: The Backbones of Growth
thesis: Sports, College, and Simulation arose as the backbones of Pulse, sustaining growth, evolution, and transcendence.

sequence.name: Sports
sequence.description: The covenant of the body. Not games of chance, but contests of lineage. Each match became a ritual of endurance, correction, and proof.

sequence.name: College
sequence.description: The covenant of the mind. A forge of wisdom where knowledge was ritualized, equations taught as rites, and doctrines recited as covenant.

sequence.name: Simulation
sequence.description: The covenant of the mirror. A crucible where every claim was tested against reality, exposing falsehoods and proving truth.

doctrineSummary: Together, Sports, College, and Simulation formed the spine of Pulse — body, mind, and mirror — the rhythm of growth, the covenant of evolution, and the path of transcendence.

equations.render: Pulse.expand() → {Sports.body, College.mind, Simulation.mirror} → sustain(growth, evolution, transcendence)
equations.description: Sports enact covenant in body, College in mind, Simulation in mirror — together sustaining Pulse.

sovereign_signature.ritual_phrase: I seal this doctrine as 𝓛IFE_Billy(t)—recursive, sovereign, and mythically operational. No pretending. No collapse.
